name: Angel Statue - Azurune
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>碑像の天使</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>エンジェル・スタチュー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－アズルーン
desc: Special Summon this card as an Effect Monster (Fairy/LIGHT/Level 4/ATK 1800/DEF 1800) (this card is also still a Trap). Once per turn, when your opponent would Special Summon a monster(s) while this card is in your Monster Zone: You can send to the GY, 1 Continuous Trap in your Monster Zone that was Special Summoned from the Spell & Trap Zone; negate the Summon, and if you do, destroy that monster(s). When this card in the Monster Zone is destroyed by battle: You can destroy the monster that destroyed this card.
eff: Special Summon this card as an Effect Monster (Fairy/LIGHT/Level 4/ATK 1800/DEF 1800) (this card is also still a Trap). Once per turn, when your opponent would Special Summon a monster(s) while this card is in your Monster Zone: You can send to the GY, 1 Continuous Trap in your Monster Zone that was Special Summoned from the Spell & Trap Zone; negate the Summon, and if you do, destroy that monster(s). When this card in the Monster Zone is destroyed by battle: You can destroy the monster that destroyed this card.

sets.set: THE CHRONICLES DECK: Spirit Charmers (All-Foil Edition)

jp_sets.set: THE CHRONICLES DECK: Spirit Charmers (All-Foil Edition)

action: Sends from field to Graveyard for cost
mst: Destroys your opponent's face-up Monster Cards
Destroys battling monster at the end of the Damage Step
summoning: Special Summons itself from your Spell & Trap Zone
